---
title: "GeneKeepR: A Colony Manager's Tutorial (retired)"
---

**This tutorial has been retired (2026-07-17).** Its content -- purpose,
approach, and a tab-by-tab walkthrough -- has been ported, modernized, and
re-verified against the current modular application into the public article
["Purpose, Approach, and a Colony Manager's Guide to
Practice"](https://rmsharp.github.io/nprcgenekeepr/articles/colony-manager-guide.html),
part of the package's online documentation at <https://rmsharp.github.io/nprcgenekeepr/>.

This file is excluded from the built package (`.Rbuildignore`) and, as of
2026-07-21, is also excluded from pkgdown's article build via its leading-
underscore filename (`pkgdown::build_articles()`'s documented convention for
skipping non-article `.Rmd` files) so it is no longer part of the public
site; it is kept only as a historical record and is not maintained further.
See `docs/planning/document2-colony-manager-guide-plan.md` §12 decision 3
and `CHANGELOG.md`'s Session 398 entry for the retirement decision.
